column2:
Which device do you own?
[If multiple pick the most recent one]
column3: In what condition did you receive your device?
column4: How long have you owned the device for?
column5: Have you had to RMA your device?
column6: Does your foldable screen open all the way?
column7: Did your outer (small) screen break with no fault of your own ?
column8: Did your inner (large) screen break with no fault of your own ?
column9: What kind of screen protector do you use for your outer (small) screen?
column10: What kind of screen protector do you use for your inner (large) screen?
column11: Did your inner default screen protector peel or bubble up?
column12:
Are you seeing micro cracks on the inner screen?
[Tiny scuffs especially at the middle part that look like scratches]
column13: How is the surface of the inner screen holding up?
column15: How often do you fold your device in a day?
